name: twig
description: A presentation editor built with Electron, Svelte, and fabric.js
author: boomzero

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run svelte-check
scripts.build:unpack: npm run build && enject run -- electron-builder --dir -c.mac.identity="Apple Development: Chenrui Zhu (7UAWP6X9HF)" -c.mac.notarize=false
scripts.build:win: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.win-store.config.cjs --win appx
scripts.build:mac: npm run build && enject run -- electron-builder --mac -c.mac.identity="Apple Development: Chenrui Zhu (7UAWP6X9HF)" -c.mac.notarize=false
scripts.build:mac:release: npm run build && enject run -- electron-builder --mac -c.mac.identity="Developer ID Application: Chenrui Zhu (65ZLJ987GH)"
scripts.build:mas:dev: npm run build && rm -rf dist/mas-dev-arm64 && electron-builder --mac mas-dev --dir -c.mac.identity=null -c.masDev.identity="Apple Development: Chenrui Zhu (7UAWP6X9HF)" -c.masDev.provisioningProfile="build/twig_dev.provisionprofile"
scripts.build:mas: npm run build && rm -rf dist/mas-arm64 dist/$npm_package_name-$npm_package_version-mas.pkg && (electron-builder --mac mas --dir -c.mac.identity=null -c.mas.identity="Apple Distribution: Chenrui Zhu (65ZLJ987GH)" || test -d dist/mas-arm64/twig.app) && productbuild --component dist/mas-arm64/twig.app /Applications --sign "3rd Party Mac Developer Installer: Chenrui Zhu (65ZLJ987GH)" dist/$npm_package_name-$npm_package_version-mas.pkg
